Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lincoln and the gang are trapped in the woods with Mr. Bolhofner in 'Rumor Has It ', then in 'Training Day', Lana takes on Stella's untrainable new bunny.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Flip This Flip: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. (S6, ep 3a).

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Waking History: Eager to uncover secrets from the past, Lisa uses her technology to wake up a frozen caveman. (S7, ep 1a).

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The cheerleaders challenge Lynn and her teammates to a battle in 'Cheer Pressure', then in 'Stroke of Luck', Lori becomes a celebrity at school when she hits a hole-in-one.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Clyde and Nana Gayle are in competition in 'Out Of Step', then in 'Too Cool For School', Lincoln and friends need to get school back to normal when Principal Ramirez implements fishy rules.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Louds travel to London when Luna receives an invitation to Mick Swagger's knighting ceremony, but get caught in a mission when Lincoln runs into a familiar face.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Luan pranks Grouse in 'Gags To Riches', then in 'Sole Searching', Lynn searches for basketball shoes.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home the class tarantula in 'Along Came a Sister', then in 'Chore and Peace', Lincoln goes on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby in 'Baby Steps', and then in 'Brawl in the Family', Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, so a fight breaks out in the house.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The sisters ask Lincoln to teach them how to ask their parents for money in 'Yes Man', then in 'Friend or Faux', Lisa gets her report card and must make a friend or fail at social skills.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The house is infested with termites in 'Ruthless People', then in 'What Wood Lincoln Do?', Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment, but has a history of failure on the topic.
